# SFError.Code.noExtensionFound

**Case**

A Content Blocker or Safari app extension with the specified bundle identifier was not found, or the bundle identifier specified an extension that was not owned by you.

## Declaration

```swift
case noExtensionFound
```

## Error Codes

- **SFError.Code.loadingInterrupted**: There was an error loading the content blocker extension.
- **SFError.Code.noAttachmentFound**: The Content Blocker extension returned an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSExtensionItem] that did not include an attachment.
